objective: Apply the BASIC/ADVANCED frontend mode contract to campaign budget and frequency advanced controls.
rollbackNotes: Preserve unrelated user changes; revert only this checkpoint scope if explicitly requested.
nextAction: Release lease, record handoff, then continue with the next frontend mode-metadata slice.
outcome: Campaign Budget Guard and Workspace Frequency Policy now use typed ADVANCED_ONLY mode metadata, render-time gating, and BASIC-mode payload omission. The simple campaign Frequency Cap remains visible in BASIC as a safety control and continues through the base campaign payload.
validationRun: PASS: cd frontend; npm run lint
PASS: cd frontend; npm run build:ci
PASS: cd frontend; .\node_modules\.bin\playwright.cmd test tests/e2e/campaign-engine.spec.ts tests/e2e/ui-mode.spec.ts --project=chromium --reporter=line

Template Studio and Automation Studio still need separate BASIC/ADVANCED mode-metadata slices.
